{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"    criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss(label_smoothing=0.1)","new":"    criterion = nn.CrossEntropyLoss()","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"Label smoothing hurt the last run relative to the current best, so the safest next step is to remove it and return to the loss function that already achieved the strongest visible result. This keeps the architecture and optimization recipe unchanged while undoing the most recent regression.","secondary_modes":["micro"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DEPTH = 3","new":"DEPTH = 2","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 2e-4","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""},{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"class CIFAR10Net(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self) -> None:
        super().__init__()
        channels = BASE_CHANNELS
        bias = not USE_BATCHNORM
        stem_layers: list[nn.Module] = [nn.Conv2d(INPUT_CHANNELS, channels, 3, padding=1, bias=bias)]
        if USE_BATCHNORM:
            stem_layers.append(nn.BatchNorm2d(channels))
        stem_layers.append(nn.ReLU(inplace=True))
        self.stem = nn.Sequential(*stem_layers)
        block_layers: list[nn.Module] = [
            nn.Conv2d(channels, channels, 3, padding=1, bias=bias),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(channels) if USE_BATCHNORM else nn.Identity(),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
        ]
        block_layers.extend(
            [
                ResidualBlock(channels, dropout=DROPOUT_RATE, use_bn=USE_BATCHNORM)
                for _ in range(DEPTH)
            ]
        )
        self.blocks = nn.Sequential(*block_layers)
        self.pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool2d((1, 1))
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Flatten(),
            nn.Linear(channels, FC_HIDDEN),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            nn.Dropout(DROPOUT_RATE),
            nn.Linear(FC_HIDDEN, NUM_CLASSES),
        )

    def forward(self, x: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        x = self.stem(x)
        x = self.blocks(x)
        x = self.pool(x)
        return self.classifier(x)","new":"class CIFAR10Net(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self) -> None:
        super().__init__()
        stem_channels = BASE_CHANNELS
        stage_channels = BASE_CHANNELS * CHANNEL_MULT
        bias = not USE_BATCHNORM

        stem_layers: list[nn.Module] = [nn.Conv2d(INPUT_CHANNELS, stem_channels, 3, padding=1, bias=bias)]
        if USE_BATCHNORM:
            stem_layers.append(nn.BatchNorm2d(stem_channels))
        stem_layers.append(nn.ReLU(inplace=True))
        self.stem = nn.Sequential(*stem_layers)

        stage1_layers: list[nn.Module] = [
            nn.Conv2d(stem_channels, stem_channels, 3, padding=1, bias=bias),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(stem_channels) if USE_BATCHNORM else nn.Identity(),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
        ]
        stage1_layers.extend(
            [
                ResidualBlock(stem_channels, dropout=DROPOUT_RATE, use_bn=USE_BATCHNORM)
                for _ in range(DEPTH)
            ]
        )
        self.stage1 = nn.Sequential(*stage1_layers)

        transition_layers: list[nn.Module] = [
            nn.Conv2d(stem_channels, stage_channels, 3, stride=2, padding=1, bias=bias)
        ]
        if USE_BATCHNORM:
            transition_layers.append(nn.BatchNorm2d(stage_channels))
        transition_layers.append(nn.ReLU(inplace=True))
        self.transition = nn.Sequential(*transition_layers)

        stage2_layers: list[nn.Module] = [
            nn.Conv2d(stage_channels, stage_channels, 3, padding=1, bias=bias),
            nn.BatchNorm2d(stage_channels) if USE_BATCHNORM else nn.Identity(),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
        ]
        stage2_layers.extend(
            [
                ResidualBlock(stage_channels, dropout=DROPOUT_RATE, use_bn=USE_BATCHNORM)
                for _ in range(DEPTH)
            ]
        )
        self.stage2 = nn.Sequential(*stage2_layers)

        self.pool = nn.AdaptiveAvgPool2d((1, 1))
        self.classifier = nn.Sequential(
            nn.Flatten(),
            nn.Linear(stage_channels, FC_HIDDEN),
            nn.ReLU(inplace=True),
            nn.Dropout(DROPOUT_RATE),
            nn.Linear(FC_HIDDEN, NUM_CLASSES),
        )

    def forward(self, x: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        x = self.stem(x)
        x = self.stage1(x)
        x = self.transition(x)
        x = self.stage2(x)
        x = self.pool(x)
        return self.classifier(x)","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"The current model appears to have plateaued, and the remaining capacity is better spent on a proper two-stage residual hierarchy than on more scalar tuning. This change uses the existing CHANNEL_MULT knob, adds downsampling, and restores the better regularization level, which should give the classifier a more expressive CIFAR-10 backbone without a radical rewrite.","secondary_modes":["caching","topk"]}
